name: Yoinks
description: Paste or share a public media link, choose a format, download with yt-dlp, then save to Photos or Files.

localizedDescriptions.en: Paste or share a public media link, choose a format, download with yt-dlp, then save to Photos or Files.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 粘贴或分享公开媒体链接，选择格式后用 yt-dlp 下载，保存到相册或文件。
